scripts.preci: corepack pnpm --dir ../.. --filter @glassgpt/backend-contracts run ci && corepack pnpm --dir ../.. --filter @glassgpt/backend-infra run build
scripts.lint: biome check --error-on-warnings src package.json tsconfig.json vitest.config.ts wrangler.jsonc
scripts.ci: biome check --error-on-warnings src package.json tsconfig.json vitest.config.ts wrangler.jsonc && mkdir -p .wrangler && wrangler types .wrangler/backend-env.d.ts && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit && vitest run --config vitest.config.ts && wrangler deploy --dry-run --outdir .wrangler/dry-run --metafile .wrangler/bundle-meta.json --keep-vars && depcruise --config ../../dependency-cruiser.cjs src
